title: Example File Schema
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter of example files in the examples/ directory

entry_id.description: Slug of the taxonomy entry this example demonstrates

topic_slug.description: Slug of the anchor topic (e.g., async-standups)

author_type.description: Who produced the example content. human = written by a person; llm = fully AI-generated; hybrid = AI-generated and then edited by a human.

llm_model.description: Model identifier (required when author_type is llm or hybrid)

llm_prompt_file.description: Relative path to the prompt file used to generate this example

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 date when the example was generated

edited_by.description: Human editor name (applicable when author_type is hybrid)

voice_id.description: Voice entry ID if this example demonstrates a voice combination

tone_id.description: Tone entry ID if this example demonstrates a tone combination

style_id.description: Style entry ID if this example demonstrates a style combination

format_id.description: Format entry ID if this example demonstrates a format combination

audience.description: Intended audience for the example content

word_count.description: Word count of the example body
